info.description: Bakkt Onboarding API for user/corporate creation, authentication, KYC/KYB, and profile management. This is the foundational API for accessing other Bakkt services.
info.title: Onboarding API

post.description: Creating a user which is used as the base entity for all other requests

first_name.description: Only letters (no accents), and spaces. No numbers or special characters.

last_name.description: Only letters (no accents), and spaces. No numbers or special characters.

sign_in_crypto_address.description: Needs to be a valid ethereum address used for SIWE login purposes only. Initially defaults to target_address if no value is provided

target_address.description: Needs to be a valid ethereum address. Normally unique per merchant, unless address is allowed to have duplicates

target_address_type.description: Specifies whether the address is hosted by VASP or self hosted by the user

target_address_vasp.description: Optional parameter to specify the VASP for target address if the address is hosted

target_solana_address.description: Needs to be an active and rent exempt solana account address

target_solana_address_type.description: Specifies whether the solana address is hosted by VASP or self hosted by the user

target_solana_address_vasp.description: Optional parameter to specify the VASP for solana target address if the address is hosted

country.description: Country of residence of the Individual. Required a valid ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code

bvn.description: Bank verification number used for customers in Nigeria

accepted_terms_and_condition_hash.description: A base64 hash of the user-accepted Bakkt's Terms & Conditions (https://api.bakkt.com/epmap-terms-of-service)

accepted_privacy_policy_hash.description: A base64 hash of the user-accepted Bakkt Privacy Policy (https://api.bakkt.com/ub-privacy-and-policy)

accepted_terms_of_service_hash.description: A base64 hash of the user-accepted Bakkt Terms of Service (https://api.bakkt.com/terms-of-service)

post.description: Authenticate a user using Sign in with Ethereum or via trigger the email OTP

requestBody.description:
Two authentication methods are supported (use exactly one):

**Option 1 - SIWE (Sign in with Ethereum)**: Provide `message` and `signature` from SIWE flow
**Option 2 - OTP (One-Time Password)**: Provide `user_uuid` to trigger email OTP

Note: You must provide either (message + signature) OR (user_uuid), but not both.

message.description: SIWE message. Required for SIWE authentication. Must be provided together with `signature`. Do not use with `user_uuid`.
message.example:
sandbox.bakkt.com wants you to sign in with your Ethereum account:
0xCC0964076916291c8CBB198F350CcAaD941ABF00

Sign in with Ethereum

URI: https://api.bakkt.com/auth/login
Version: 1
Chain ID: 80002
Nonce: qtm52ohggQTH1X6ZS
Issued At: 2023-03-03T13:16:30.045Z
Expiration Time: 2023-03-03T17:16:30.044Z

signature.description: SIWE signature. Required for SIWE authentication. Must be provided together with `message`. Do not use with `user_uuid`.

user_uuid.description: User UUID. Required for OTP authentication. Do not use with `message` or `signature`.

200.description: Successful Login. Returns session and user UUID for SIWE login, or empty response for OTP login (OTP sent via email).

unblock_session_id.description: Session ID (only present for SIWE login)

user_uuid.description: User UUID (only present for SIWE login)
